interactive.rationale: The page now has a reduced-motion simulator plus live computed readout for naive versus respectful inputs.

references.rationale: The 'see also' section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5082469066604544 — matches the feature.

design_system.rationale: Inline styles route through --bg/--text/--accent variables, no raw hex, and button overrides pair background + color correctly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept's lede mirrors the feature index promise — same nouns, same scope.

spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the keywords the spec/feature-index lede surfaces — covers the headline API surface.

edge_cases.rationale: Shows both the reduced-motion branch and the invalid none-keyword rejection for caret-animation.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: focused the respectful input, toggled simulated reduced motion, and observed computed caret-animation switch from manual/rainbow to auto/none while CSS.supports('caret-animation: none') stayed false. Console and network were clean.
